description: This is ALL an AI agent needs to operate 10 applications. One map. One tool (bash).

gitea.db: docker exec pg-gitea psql -U postgres -d gitea

wikijs.db: docker exec pg-wiki psql -U postgres -d wikijs

mattermost.db: docker exec pg-mattermost psql -U postgres -d mattermost

vikunja.db: docker exec pg-vikunja psql -U postgres -d vikunja

nocodb.db: docker exec pg-nocodb psql -U postgres -d nocodb

miniflux.db: docker exec pg-miniflux psql -U postgres -d miniflux

grafana.db: docker exec pg-grafana psql -U postgres -d grafana

redmine.db: docker exec pg-redmine psql -U postgres -d redmine

directus.db: docker exec pg-directus psql -U postgres -d directus

hasura.db: docker exec pg-memos psql -U postgres -d memos
